race.description: Q Mechanical Ht4 Provincial Pathways Series Hcp
race.comment: THE LAST DANCE (3) has been in the market at his last couple of runs but struggled to threaten when tackling tougher opposition. Rates highly in this line up and can play a major role. NOYERS (1) turned in a fine effort to win by a long neck at this track and distance last start in a much improved effort. No reason he can't keep the ball rolling. AGREEANCE (9) finds it tough to land her second winning blow but is going better than her form reads and Milnes sticking highlights that. Win won't shock. MR TRAFFICANTI (8) was in the money two starts back at this track but failed to follow it up last time. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time. FORTIS IN ARMIS (7) has struggled of late but there are earlier runs that can measure up on the short turnaround. Don't dismiss completely.
